titleStmt.title: SII 30.156: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 156. (A.R. No. 235 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple—on the south wall Parāntaka-Chōḻā I: year 25: 932 A.D.

summary.p: Records that Sembiyaṉ Kiḻār-nāṭṭukkōṉ a headman of Kiḷinallūr in Kiḻārkkūṟṟam in Sōḻa-nāḍu gifted 15 Kaḷañju of poṉ for burning a perpetual lamp with one uḻakku oil to god Śrī Pōndai Māhadēva bhāṭṭārakar at Rājamallach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Dāmark-kōṭṭam on the occasion of solar eclipse. The ūrār and the sabhaiyār of Vadiyūr in Nīrvēḷūr-nāḍu in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam, who received the gift agreed to measure out one uḻakku of oil daily to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matirai koṇṭa kopparake
saripar(m)maṟku yāṇṭu Irupattaiñ
cāvatu coḻanāṭṭuk kiḻārk kūṟṟattu
k kiḷinallūrpperatikārañ ceyta kiḷinallūr kiḻa
vaṉāṉa cempiyaṉ kiḻārnāṭṭukkoṉ tā
mark koṭṭattut tiruvekampapuṟattu
rājamallaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu
śrīpoṉtai mahādevabhaṭṭā
rakarkku vallavaraiyariṭaik kaṭavarā
ka kaṭai ṉtaruḷa sū
ryyagrahaṇattil tirunaṉtā viḷakku O
ṉṟu Iravum pakaluñ candrādittyar Uḷḷaḷavume
nicati Uḻakku neyyāl Erippataṟku vait
ta poṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcu Ippoṉ patiṉai
ṅkaḻañcuḷataiñRead kaḻañcu kaḷaintaimutalākak koṇṭu Ippo
ṉṉāṟ poliūṭṭut tevar Uḻakkiṉāl nicati Uḻa
kkeṇṇai śrīkoilukkey koṭuvantu cantirā
tittaval Aṭṭuvomāṉom Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk koṭṭattu ni
rveḷūr nāṭṭu vatiyūr sabhaiyomum Ūromum Itaṟ
ṟiṟampil dharmmāsaṉatte nicatippa
ṭi Irupattu nālekāl kāṇandaṇḍappaṭa Oṭṭi I
ṭṭuk kuṭuttom vatiyūr Ūrom Ivve
ṇṇai muṭṭil ceṟṟa Āḷukku nicati Iraṇṭu co
ṟu kuṭuppomāṉom vatiyūr sabhaiyo
m Itu paṉmāyeśvara rakṣai . tarā nilaiviḷa
kkoṉṟu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
